questions.question: Who will cry first during the vows?

options.label: Marion Jemima — she's been planning this speech for months
Livingston — quietly, but definitely
Both, at exactly the same moment
The Father — moved by the occasion

questions.question: What will the first dance at the reception feel like?

options.label: Slow and deeply romantic — just the two of them
A surprise choreographed number no one saw coming
Beautiful until the whole family joins in
Mercifully brief — they're not dancers

questions.question: Who will truly own the beach reception dance floor?

options.label: The uncles — unstoppable as always
Marion Jemima — it was always her stage
Livingston — a dark horse on the floor
The youngest guests — no inhibitions whatsoever

questions.question: Which speech will make the entire room cry?

options.label: Marion Jemima's parents
Livingston's parents
The best man's roast-turned-tribute
Someone completely unexpected takes the mic

questions.question: What will be the most magical moment at the beach reception?

options.label: The golden hour photos just after sunset
A spontaneous second reading of vows at the shoreline
When the perfect song comes on and everyone stops talking
Someone inevitably ends up in the sea
